{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231542592913874971CE8F8F3781"}"},"total":1172},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7574059747374793497","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"非常好看，冰系和长枪都是很冷门的元素，作者能写的如此生动确实要表扬，伴生兽和女主的戏也写的不错，以后肯定是都市高武中的上上等，希望老师不要烂尾，加油！[奸笑][赞]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1763475607,"group_id":"7526995715613002776","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"我要创造一个只有米学的世界！","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0DlP+HaROCGC6ylqBjFAYThxbG7LeLlExc8hIs8rP4H","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/124cbe28c47a4dd194c0e9e1e20f9e20~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776789628&x-signature=usr5to4H9P0%2BuzUZtRPikd38UjA%3D","user_id":"3513687997429063","user_name":"暴躁的星核精"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3513687997429063","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7526995715613002776","book_info":{"abstract":"【冰系】+【长枪】+【高爽】+【多女主】
（评分刚出，后续还会涨……）
陆渊穿越到凶兽丛生的异能世界。
和陆渊想的一样，在觉醒仪式上，比异能先觉醒的，赫然是穿越者必备的系统！
系统不仅为他发放稀有异能，还提供刷怪就能变强的机会！
只是，系统发放的异能属性，似乎有些不太对劲？
我一个大男人，你居然让我玩冰系？？？
不过，真香定律可能会迟到，但绝对不会缺席！
有控制，有爆发，这谁能不爱啊？
在未来陆渊一路横推，甚至能够冻结时空之时，他才感慨一句：“原来冰系才是无敌路啊！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/8aa63a336f016edd6ea9326e73676427","author":"极暗诞于光","author_id":"","book_id":"7526995715613002776","book_name":"你这冰系，强的同时还过分帅气！","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#102038","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"10.3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1014,"name":"都市高武","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1014&name=都市高武&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":90,"name":"天才","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=90&name=天才&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7526997622230368792","read_count":"102196","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"973823"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.2","serial_count":"478","tags":"都市高武,都市,系统,穿越,天才,无敌","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/0a0e55fc777e9297b7735252c653e115~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779435779&x-signature=xhf4sHuy3WmdVtzf7K9XieME47g%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"341288580820772","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"168"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231542592913874971CE8F8F3781"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":6,"forwarde
